name: CROSS_TOP_ASSIGNEES_GLOBAL_YEAR_RANGE
description: Global top assignees by year range.
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee), (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year >= $start_year AND y.year <= $end_year
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 20;
